ai-labs/anthropic.summary: MAJOR (Jun 13): US Commerce Dept issued export-control directive requiring Anthropic to suspend Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for all foreign nationals, including Anthropic staff, citing national security and a reported jailbreak method. Models had debuted Jun 9; pulled Jun 12. Anthropic said the jailbreak was narrow. Bloomberg, Fortune, Al Jazeera confirmed. CEO Dario Amodei published "Policy on the AI Exponential" (Jun 10) calling for federal authority over AI safety after Mythos Preview discovered thousands of high-severity vulnerabilities. Government-forced model suspension with global user impact is significant governance/safety event.
